title: Remember Conversation Middleware
interaction_flow: Caller → AnonymousAgent: prompt(string $prompt, array $attachments)
AnonymousAgent (Promptable) → Provider: prompt(new AgentPrompt(agent, prompt, attachments, provider, model, timeout))
Provider → RememberConversation::handle(AgentPrompt $prompt, Closure $next): intercept via middleware pipeline
RememberConversation → next($prompt): pass through to actual provider call → returns AgentResponse
RememberConversation → AgentResponse::then(callback): register post-response callback
[callback executes after response is resolved]
callback → agent->currentConversation(): check if conversation exists (returns ?string conversationId)
[if no current conversation]
callback → ConversationStore::storeConversation(participant->id, generateTitle(prompt)): insert into agent_conversations, returns UUID string
callback → RememberConversation::generateTitle(string $prompt): auto-generate title
generateTitle → TextProvider::textGateway(): get TextGateway
generateTitle → TextProvider::cheapestTextModel(): get model name
generateTitle → TextGateway::generateText(provider, model, instructions, [UserMessage(Str::limit($prompt,500))]): returns TextResponse
generateTitle → Str::limit(response->text, 100): truncate title
[on Throwable] generateTitle → Str::limit($prompt, 100, preserveWords:true): fallback title
callback → agent->continue(conversationId, conversationParticipant()): set conversationId + user on agent
[always]
callback → ConversationStore::storeUserMessage(conversationId, participant->id, AgentPrompt): insert role=user row into agent_conversation_messages, returns messageId UUID

callback → ConversationStore::storeAssistantMessage(conversationId, participant->id, AgentPrompt, AgentResponse): insert role=assistant row with text/toolCalls/toolResults/usage/meta, returns messageId UUID
callback → AgentResponse::withinConversation(conversationId, conversationParticipant()): annotate response with conversation context
RememberConversation → Caller: returns AgentResponse (with conversation context attached)
conditional_logic: IF agent->currentConversation() IS NULL: create new conversation (storeConversation + generateTitle + agent->continue)
IF agent->currentConversation() IS NOT NULL: skip conversation creation, go straight to storing messages
INSIDE generateTitle: TRY TextGateway::generateText CATCH Throwable → fallback to Str::limit($prompt, 100)
key_relationships: RememberConversation depends_on TextProvider (injected via constructor, used only for title generation)
AnonymousAgent uses Promptable trait (provides prompt/stream/queue methods and provider/model resolution)
RememberConversation reads agent via AgentPrompt::$agent property
DatabaseConversationStore implements ConversationStore (DB tables: agent_conversations, agent_conversation_messages)
AgentPrompt extends Prompt, holds: agent, prompt string, attachments Collection, provider, model, timeout
TextProvider interface exposes: textGateway(), cheapestTextModel(), prompt(), stream()
TextGateway::generateText() signature: (TextProvider, string model, ?string instructions, Message[] messages, ...) => TextResponse
important_notes: Middleware is POST-processing only: it wraps next($prompt) and uses .then() callback, so the real LLM call happens first, then persistence
generateTitle uses cheapestTextModel with a fixed system instruction; fallback on any Throwable
conversationParticipant() can be null (anonymous users); user_id stored as nullable
agent->continue() sets both conversationId and conversationUser on the agent instance after creation
withinConversation() attaches conversation metadata back onto the AgentResponse returned to the caller
Middleware is in namespace Laravel\Ai\Middleware; registered per-agent via HasMiddleware contract or middleware pipeline
